title: NYSE Arca Equities - CEE Ruling in UVIX - 2X Long VIX Futures ETF
raw_text:
NYSE Arca Equities - CEE Ruling in UVIX - 2X Long VIX Futures ETF
Markets: NYSE ARCA EQUITIES; Services: Trading
NYSE Arca in conjunction with other UTP exchanges, has ruled to bust all erroneous trades in UVIX - 2X Long VIX Futures ETF, executed on NYSE Arca between 04:00:00 and 04:30:00 ET today, at or below $58.10. This ruling is not eligible for appeal.

title: NYSE Arca Equities - Trades Under Review -  UVIX - 2X Long VIX Futures ETF
raw_text:
NYSE Arca Equities - Trades Under Review -  UVIX - 2X Long VIX Futures ETF
Markets: NYSE ARCA EQUITIES; Services: Trading
NYSE Arca is currently reviewing potentially erroneous trades in symbol UVIX - 2X Long VIX Futures ETF - executed at NYSE Arca between 04:00:00 and 04:30:00 ET today. Customers should review their activity for potentially erroneous trades. We will update with a ruling when available.
